title: Dracma Lite
description: Virtual shop plugin where you can create your own products and currencies.
body:
# Dracma Lite

**Dracma Lite** is the free edition of Dracma, designed for Minecraft servers that need a simple, lightweight and functional economy and virtual shop system.

![Dracma Lite virtual shop plugin banner showing the plugin name, a Minecraft-style coin, and a short description about creating products and currencies.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2ckyjDgF/images/5241cb81699c6fd8ead0adf76924ac07f9fb403e.png)

Dracma Lite provides the essential tools to manage custom currencies, player payments, shop menus, purchase confirmations, taxes and local data storage without requiring an external database.

It is ideal for small and medium servers that want to start using Dracma before upgrading to the Premium edition.

---

## Features

### Economy System

- Custom currencies
- Player-to-player payments
- Currency commands
- Vault support
- PlaceholderAPI support

### Shop System

- Virtual shop menus
- Shop categories
- Configurable products
- Shopping cart system
- Instant purchases
- Purchase confirmations
- Stock system
- One-time purchase products
- Required rank products

### Taxes and Discounts

- Shop tax system
- Payment tax system
- Minimum tax support
- Discount system

### Product Actions

- Execute commands when purchasing
- Bulk command support
- Basic purchase logs

### Storage and Compatibility

- Local YAML storage
- ItemsAdder support
- Item-NBT-API support
- bStats integration

## Support

Join our Discord server for general support:  
https://dracma.net/discord

Access our official wiki:  
https://wiki.dracma.net
